channel.title: Recent Projects on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Recent Projects on Eric Spencer

item.title: UDP server (binary)
item.description: UDP send/receive utilities for binary payloads.

item.title: TLA+ Formal Generation
item.description: Early exploratory repo for generating TLA+ specs from natural-language requirements with an LLM, with a TLC harness wired in. The scaffold that eventually grew into ChatTLA+.

item.title: Git Key Guardian
item.description: Protect sensitive keys from accidentally being uploaded to your git history at any point.

item.title: GluCoPilot
item.description: AI Glucose Insights App

item.title: Training an LLM on ASCII
item.description: A toy transformer that reads pyfiglet ASCII art and tries to spit the original word back out. Calling it an LLM is generous.

item.title: mc-carspot: Online Parking Simulation in Rust
item.description: A tiny Rust simulator for the online parking-spot problem with switching costs.

item.title: iOS Soundboard
item.description: A SwiftUI soundboard app I built in an afternoon to get more comfortable with iOS.

item.title: Gesture
item.description: A proof of concept Jarvis-style macOS controller that takes voice commands and hand gestures from the webcam.

item.title: AIs Talking Philosophy
item.description: A toy where two local Ollama models loop on consciousness until one of them gives up

item.title: llmjammer
item.description: Obfuscator for public Python code to confuse LLMs

item.title: Connect 4 Game Engine
item.description: A Chess engine-esque Connect 4 analyzer

item.title: Web Based TLA+ Microwave
item.description: An interactive microwave in the browser to learn TLA+

item.title: coq Presentation
item.description: The formal methods language

item.title: YouTube Downloader
item.description: Locally hosted youtube downloader for mp3 and mp4s

item.title: AI Sign Language Interpreter
item.description: A Simple Sign Language Recognition App using OpenCV

item.title: flatten-repo VSC Extension
item.description: A VS Code extension I made when I kept running out of Copilot credits — flattens a repo into one .txt file you can paste into a free LLM.

item.title: Dexcom Navbar Icon Mac OS
item.description: View your Dexcom number in your Mac OS Navigation Bar

item.title: TDX Window Blocker
item.description: Custom Safari Script for TDX Popups

item.title: CTA Transit Tracker
item.description: A real-time bus and train tracking system built during Loyola's Hackathon.

item.title: MLB Hall of Fame Predictor
item.description: A scikit-learn decision tree that guesses whether a current MLB player would get voted into Cooperstown, built for the Google Cloud x MLB hackathon.

item.title: Terminal GPT
item.description: A small Python CLI for chatting with OpenAI and running English-to-Bash commands from the terminal. The thing I actually open when I want to talk to a model.
